title: pleopeltis dulitensis
intro: Pleopeltis dulitensis is a species of fern belonging to the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pleopeltis dulitensis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be dried and made into tea, or used in infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
